center.name: Johann Wilhelm von Müller
center.summary: Johann Wilhelm von Müller是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Pale rockfinch，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pale rockfinch or pale rock sparrow (Carpospiza brachydactyla) is a small sparrow found in the Middle East and Central Asia

links.evidence: The pale rockfinch or pale rock sparrow (Carpospiza brachydactyla) is a small sparrow found in the Middle East and Central Asia
